record.field: Risk assessment for Master CARD 001 accounts.
Strengthen transaction monitoring for credit card usage.
Jaac - State Joint Local Govt Acct

Strengthen transaction monitoring for jaac state joint usage.
Risk assessment for Local Govt accounts.
Strengthen transaction monitoring for local goverment account usage.
Risk assessment for TT C CARD TEST accounts.
Implement robust testing protocols for card transactions.

Enhance KYC processes for individual account holders.
Risk assessment for TA Current Corporate accounts.
Conduct enhanced due diligence for corporate entities.
Risk assessment for Switch Savings Tier3 NGN accounts.
Implement periodic reviews of low-balance savings accounts.

Monitor overdraft limits and repayment patterns closely.
